user.title: Connect to your FortiGate
user.description: Enter the details of your FortiGate and a REST API administrator token.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the FortiGate, with an optional port (for example fw.example.com or 192.168.1.99:8443).
data_description.api_token: Token for a REST API administrator on the FortiGate.
data_description.vdom: Virtual domain to manage. Leave as root unless you use multiple VDOMs.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable only if the FortiGate uses a self-signed certificate.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate FortiGate
reauth_confirm.description: The API token for {host} was rejected. Enter a new REST API administrator token.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the FortiGate. Check the host, port and SSL settings. Details: {error_detail}
error.invalid_auth: The FortiGate rejected the API token. Check the token and the administrator's trusted hosts. Details: {error_detail}
